title: Are there any apps that can trigger automations off a specific value in a text column?

posts.author: CFranklyn11 (Christian Franklyn | Orangedot | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Just reaching out to the community to see if there has been anyone who has been able to develop an app that triggers off of a specific value in a text colum.
If text column contains _____ then _____.

It’s limiting that we can only have it be if column is known or empty.
